name: Angry Birds VR: Isle of Pigs

reviews.review_description: My husband runs away from games.. All of them. I had him try this one and he talks about it! I'm having him play again tomorrow and he's OK with it. He likes this game! It's great getting him involved in MY personal life

This game in virtual reality is really a fun. I had previously played Angry Birds on mobile and PC, but playing it in an immersive VR environment feels completely different and much more enjoyable. It’s a simple but entertaining VR experience. Recommended.

This game is exactly what anyone could hope for in an Angry Birds game.
It's fun, playful and the visuals are fantastic. It looks good in a VR mode and Mixed Reality. Please make another one soon!

Always been an Angry Birds fan on my phone, tablet and even Top Golf. Now you can actually pull back a slingshot with both hands. YES! Sign me up. Just get this and enjoy. Nuff said.

developer_response.body: Sorry to hear you are experiencing issues with the game. Please make a bug report on our Resolution Games zendesk describing the issue in greater detail so we have a chance to fix it.

reviews.review_description: Need more worlds and levels !! I can’t play AB on the phone … it’s too small… this is awesome

I think at this point, everybody knows what they’re getting into here.  Playing it in 3-d in VR is a lot of fun in small doses. It’s the perfect game to hop into for 10-15 minutes and work on getting 3 stars on a few levels. Very good for casual gamers… over the first 150 levels or so, there was just one spot I needed help with because some of the level mechanics aren’t obvious. 
It loses 1 star for a couple reasons: looks like no expansions will ever be coming. Unfortunate, because this is the sort of game that should’ve been supported via periodic level update packs. The other problem is tracking issues. Very often the slingshot starts jumping around uncontrollably, and you have to wait for it to settle down before you can properly aim and shoot. Not game-breaking, but it definitely needs to be fixed.
The controls will make you want to smash your headset when you’re trying to shoot and it keeps sending you to another part of the map.  Such a stupid and fixable flaw.

reviews.review_title: A Smashing Good Time in VR! - 2025 -
reviews.review_description:
Absolutely fantastic! Angry Birds VR: Isle of Pigs takes the classic bird-flinging fun we all know and love and launches it into a whole new dimension. The feeling of using the slingshot in VR is incredibly intuitive and satisfying. Being able to walk around the structures to find the perfect angle for your shot adds a brilliant new layer of strategy to the game.
The levels are wonderfully designed, and the physics-based destruction is just as chaotic and hilarious as ever. It's a joy to watch those piggy towers come crumbling down in glorious 3D. The game looks great, runs smoothly, and is perfect for players of all ages. It’s an absolute blast and a must-have for any VR library!
Sublime
I don't know what your talking About but this game is the best game i've ever played since Asgard's wrath 2 i Absolutely love this game is sick
The textures are pretty low res, but lowkey a great VR demo
Needs more levels or dlc like I finished the game in 2 hrs

Seeing this is one of the best games ever made. It's a BIG step from when I went from a 5 year old iPad kid, to this amazing vr version of angry birds! Honestly this was one of the best games I will ever experience in my life.

reviews.review_title: Angry Birds & Pigs VR, what a game.
reviews.review_description: I wasn't expecting a lot from this game, just an occasional play, but in honesty, playing this in VR or in mixed reality is absolutely incredible and quite literally a blast.  I would wholeheartedly recommend it.  I have a quest three.   I wondered if they ( the developers) could expand these to VR angry Birds space and other variants?

I downloaded this for the mixed reality feature so that everyone in my family could enjoy it since some get dizzy from full vr immersion. It was surprisingly fun. I love being able to play sitting or standing and the levels are well designed. Vr angry birds is something I never thought I would see, and never thought I would want, but here I am, loving this game. 10/10
Great game, is there ever going to be an update or angry birds two?
Since the first level to all the rest the game is stunning

Don’t ever touch this game. I had enjoyed this game on the iOS. But in VR, it is very badly designed. You get stuck at most of the levels before being able to reach any conclusion.
A game should be designed as a player should be able to progress after a little effort 
But this game does not take into account any of the past play techniques of the player  and hence gets stuck for many hours at a stage at one level. I repeat do not ever touch this game in capitals. 
￼

I honestly didn’t have much interest in this game but it was available to play on Quest+. I figured I would download to let my niece play it. Before I let her play,I decided to try it out for a few minutes. Surprisingly,I didn’t want to hand it over and ended up playing for around 45mins. It is a very simple designed game and is a far cry from what I normally play but it definitely has an unexpected charm to it. I could honestly see myself putting hours into this game. I has a lot of replay value as you can go back and try to top your high score. I never played the original Angry Birds but I know it was an extremely popular mobile game. I would imagine the slightly addictive gameplay loop is very similar to what the devs accomplish with this game. I wasn’t expecting to say this but I recommend this game
Very fun and entertaining…
Downloaded this as a free from horizon +, this is the only way to play angry birds now. I genuinely want a whole collection now

If you liked Angry Birds in the early
 2000's you will love this!
Like it
I can not click the start arrow to start the game.

I absolutely love this game. It's great if you just want a quick play or you can play for ages. The birds are so cute and the pigs are funny. Also the mixed reality is awesome . I'm an oldie and new to vr but this game has blown me away ( no pun intended )..

This game is excellent, great graphics, great sound, plenty of content and it's simplicity makes it a great game for introducing people to VR that have absolutely no interest in VR. You will have trouble getting your headset back once you hand it over.

Reminds me of the Angry birds mobile game. Really engaging. Great as you can play sitted. When feeling lazy … it’s my go to game. I love how you feel fully immersed in that environment, also the different angles of view, and graphics.

Really great version of a classic game. 
Wasn't sure on how it would play but was very surprised at how good and addictive the game is. 
Was on sale when I bought and glad I did. 
Highly recommended.
I've played angry birds non vr before. This is so much fun and the birds are cute. I couldn't put it down.

reviews.review_title: Angry Birds as it should be
reviews.review_description:
This is the best Angry Birds game ever made. I suffer from Angry Birds derangement, but this game has slowed my breathing, and my hands no longer shake since this version cured me after severe damage caused by overexposure to said birds for the last 16 years.
Thanks to the Devs/Heros
Really reminded me of the feel that you get playing this game originally after watching the movie. I love the fact you can design your own maps. A little to expensive for what it is though.

Started playing angry birds when it first came out on the phone so I had to get it for my Oculus.  It's like you're on the island and the birds and pigs make me feel like I'm in the Angry Bird movies.

reviews.review_title: This game is great and excellent
reviews.review_description: I love it

Never played angry birds before, didnt think i was going to like it and i did. The controls are not hard to figure out , just point and shoot. Great game. This is a game that everyone can play , even grandma 👍🫶 excellent work devs 💯

reviews.review_title: 3.5 stars if I could, but it's 4 at best
reviews.review_description:
The gameplay is pretty straightforward. You'll experience exactly what you see in the trailer. I was obsessed with Angry Birds when I was a 7-10. My favorite was Angry Birds SPACE. Now I'm 21, and this game is just a decent experience.

I wish there were more official levels because you breeze through them pretty easily. You could probably complete them all within 2 hours with all three stars. I swear, the mobile games were much harder (though it was probably because I was a kid). I wish there were more unique mechanics because this feels very barebones.

I didn't even mention the fact that the "coolness factor" dies down pretty quickly. Sure, it's kind of cool to use the slingshot in VR, but it gets old fast. While I was playing, I was thinking how much I preferred playing on mobile.

Ironically, moving angry birds into the VR platform is more limiting. Sure, the levels are 3D now. But I feel like the 2D levels were much better crafted and allowed more gameplay mechanics.

Overall, this game is 4 stars at best. (I would've rated it 3.5 stars if I could) I just feel like the older Rovio Angry Bird apps had more detail and passion put into them. Unfortunately, I can't even play the classics like Space, Rio, and Star Wars anymore..

reviews.review_title: Great game, but with a issue or two.
reviews.review_description:
Im loved the game on Rift, but has issues with MR on Quest 3 (the game only shown half of the graphics). But got a simple fix: 

Dont stand up in this game, just sit down on your chair and then its play wonderfull.

its a fun game perfect for MR!

reviews.review_title: feels like you are in the movie 👍
reviews.review_description: it feels like you’re in the movie, it’s great! i would 100% recommend this. if the devs see this, please add an “angry birds space” game mode, that would be so cool! 👍
Fun game - gave 4 stars because the game is VERY short with only 4 small levels.

developer_response.body:
Happy to hear you enjoyed the game!
Angry Birds VR have 8 worlds with 13 levels each. While it is true extra skilled players may finish the levels quickly we also recommend to check out our "Level builder" containing more than 35000 user created levels for more challenges. Or maybe join the community and build an extra challenging level to share with others?
Thanks for playing!

reviews.review_description: I had a blast playing this in MR! Highly recommend!
There could be so much more going on. It's very plain and has glitches
This is a blast and lots of replayability
Addictive and satisfying, with believable physics and nice design.
Awesome new angry birds game.
Very good game! Funny! 5/5

reviews.review_title: As a grown man: This game is super fun
reviews.review_description: I've been playing angry birds since the ipod touch days and wow, this is so much better. You wouldn't expect a game that started out as a mobile game to be of very high quality, but this game is surprisingly polished, fun, and immersive. The music is catchy, the controls are intuitive, and it's just awesome seeing the angry birds in full 3D and really pulling the slingshot yourself, as opposed to just sliding your finger on a screen.

I have never played any of the "Angry Birds" franchise.  But was running out of things in my Wishlist and was looking for good puzzle/adventure games to follow the Moss books and Humanity - admittedly, I did not have high hopes obviously.  "Isle of Pigs" is really well done.  Graphics are great. Controls are mostly intuitive, responsive, and accurate.   Mixed reality works well.  The piggies are suitably annoying so you don't feel too bad about wrecking their island - I gather they stole some eggs and had it coming.  But despite some pretty puzzling stages (and many more available  from an avid community) it will not hold my interest and my quest continues.  Still, I cannot deduct any stars simply because the franchise does not appeal to me personally - too well done to give any less than 5 stars.

It’s a cool classic. I was hoping the buildings would be bigger instead of a small circle. The majority of the environment goes unused so it makes sense to transfer to mixed reality. 
If it was bigger more guys would like the bigger explosions! Cool of you get it on sale for $10 like I did.
Love the game, please add more Worlds. I would definitely buy additional ones.

Please add more!!!! Take my money :) 

This game makes me think… distracts me and makes me feel so cool when I figure something out :) especially in mixed reality. It’s juts fun!

reviews.review_title: Ok game, insane privacy and EULA
reviews.review_description:
This game is an example of roofing customers. Typical Rovio style: insanely long EULA, (you get only a URL, and agree button.
Knowing Rovios previous borderline malware levels of tracking and permission abuse on Android, anything is possible, and again they show complete contempt for the user with tons of legal trickery.

With all the features that the mobile game has, you'd think they would have added some of them here. It's cool to be able to jump to different vantage points. However, there are only four bird choices, three adventures, the custom levels are a waist, and it does not have add-ons or updates. Making this game a simple, quick to finish, waist of money.

reviews.review_title: Multiplayer may boost the player base
reviews.review_description:
Such a fun game, I have recommended it to many players. 
It is also very suitable for multiplayer, with many discussions involved (like Demeo). won't it boost another buy-in? ;-D

reviews.review_title: Works well, should be in Mixed Reality
reviews.review_description: The game is great, the controls are great, it looks great. the fact that it isnt in mixed reality so you can play in your own room is such a missed opertunity. it would work so well!

He showed me the real Angry Birds games and he said this one is just not as fun. I must agree he is right.

developer_response.body: Hi there! We're sorry to hear that you didn't enjoy the game. Could you please send us an email to support@resolutiongames.com and describe your experience in more detail?

reviews.review_description: If I can just sway one person away from buying this abomination of a game, I would’ve done a service to the world. This game is a nightmare, isn’t fun, isn’t good.  Enjoy your day!

reviews.review_title: I Want a refund..game has super glitches
reviews.review_description: I got this game Monday and literally ran my headset down to 20% playing for over 2 hours straight...I LOVED LOVED LOVED IT!! The second time I played the next day I still had no problems out of the game. But yesterday when I tried to play it was IMPOSSIBLE!! My slingshot kept moving on its own just all over the place! At one time I had my left arm and hand on my leg in frustration while my slingshot lingered floating in the sky😡 the slingshot would not take my aim. When I aim at my target the slingshot just goes crazy and does what it wants to do and won't stay aimed at my target. Also my right controller keeps taking over the slingshot that is controlled by my left controller. Like a complete takeover to the point that when I put my right controller up to my left to aim and shoot the slingshot ends up in my right hand and moves as I move my right hand and I have to wait for it return to my left hand controller where it should be😖😫 and once the slingshot is back in my proper left hand I still have ALL the above listed problems when I try to play. I checked for updates on my headset and the game. I Changed the batteries in my left controller even though they didn't need changing, didn't help🙄 so lastly I tried playing Supernatural to make sure my controller wasn't malfunctioning and Supernatural went absolutely smoothly, no problems at all with my controller so it's definitely the game and I'm so disappointed because it's my favorite in less than 3 days😭 now I gotta try and get a refund!! I wanted to give 0 stars but for the 2 days of fun I DID have I gave a star a day!
System will not allow you to move to different stages even after required number of levels completed. Good to pass the the time
Why are there no more levels after the spooky island?

Ive recently played this at my grandparents since they have an oculus and I just got my own for my birthday today, I can say this is easily my favorite VR game out of what ive played. Im already a big Angry Birds fan myself so this was the best possible way you could make Angry Birds in VR. Dont get the AR version, get this version. The AR version seems much more buggy and plus the level editor
This game is fun  if u are 2. Children, yes.... for the rest of us who know our abc's and 123's... that's a NO.
Don’t know why, it’s the perfect game for playing offline but you need to be online 👎🏼
This game should be free considering it’s free on phones and tablets. ESPECIALLY since there are only four levels. I beat them all in an hour. I’d like a refund. Definitely not worth $15+tax.

developer_response.body: Thank you for sharing your opinion with us. We really appreciate you taking the time to do so. There are currently over 90 levels in the game and a huge amount of creator made levels in the level builder mode. We highly suggest that you check out those levels! We will also bring out even more spooky levels this year.

reviews.review_description: Bird flew away

developer_response.body: If you are experiencing any issues with the game, please contact us at support@resolutiongames.com. We would love to help you look into any issues.

reviews.review_description: I love angry birds games for all their silliness. Looking forward to any new levels added over time. I had a lot of fun being able to move around the target, which is a neat way to play. The characters are really cute in this game. It’s a good wholesome, silly and constructive way to let off some energy.
